name: clever-cloud-bot
description: Clever Cloud Automation Bot with Dashboard

scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p /app/bin && curl -L -o /tmp/scalingo.tar.gz https://github.com/Scalingo/cli/releases/download/1.44.1/scalingo_1.44.1_linux_amd64.tar.gz && cd /app/bin && tar -xzf /tmp/scalingo.tar.gz && mv scalingo_* scalingo && chmod +x scalingo && rm /tmp/scalingo.tar.gz && export PATH="/app/bin:$PATH"
